title: Honestly, the best laundry detergent I've ever used.
body:
I have extremely sensitive skin. I was using another brand for awhile and it was fine for my skin, but as a sports family I felt like our clothes always stunk [which I never liked] & our clothes weren't getting as clean as I would like. I was hoping to find a company that washed our clothes well, left a nice scent (not overpowering like Tide or others) & something that wouldn't make my skin break out in rashes all over.  After using Mozi for a few weeks now, I'm happy to report that our clothes are clean, smell really nice and my skin isn't angry! 

Highly recommend this brand for anyone!

I absolutely love the Mozi Wash Woven Dryer Balls! They work exactly as advertised. Since using them, my clothes dry so much quicker — even though I only use the lowest heat setting on my dryer. That’s been a huge bonus for saving energy and being gentler on my clothes.

They also help keep everything soft and separated during the drying cycle, which makes a noticeable difference. Simple, effective, and eco-friendly — you really can’t ask for more.

This is definitely a must-have item for anyone looking to speed up drying time while protecting their clothes. Highly recommend!
standout_phrases: ["my clothes dry so much quicker \u2014 even though I only use the lowest heat setting", "Simple, effective, and eco-friendly \u2014 you really can't ask for more"]

title: I love this product!
body:
It wasn't a purchase it was a free gift with my last order. I babysit a 3yr of and a 1yr old, so spills and accidents are a part of life. One such accident was on a favorite dress, marinara sauce! Instead of stressing, I remembered the pen, applied it and threw it in the wash. Much to my delight, when I pulled the dress there was no stain at all! The pen worked beautifully! I wish I had taken photos of the before and after, but I didn't think about it until after. But, needless to say, I will be ordering this again in the future.
Thank you so much Mozi, just 1 more thing to love about this company and products!

Highly recommend.

Then someone told me it is because we put it all in the dryer.  Well - this works!! Laundry comes out with the divine scent. And on the items I hung to dry - just the best scent ever! title: Broke up with Laundry Sauce for Mozi
body: I am a convert!  But let me back up - Laundry Sauce had me falling in love with scented laundry again...but uffda (as we say in MN), the luxury price was just too much for my diminishing wallet.  Enter Mozi.  I tried the sample pack and thought "nothing to lose, why not try it?"  The one I reached for first was the Alpine Woods.  I was surprised that scent is the one I fell in love with because the French Saffron is the scent I loved at Laundry Sauce.  My WHOLE HOUSE smelled of Alpine Woods - and all I used with the detergent.  No scent beads, no dryer sheets, no fabric softener.  Just detergent.  What is this witchcraft?!  I was stunned.  I saved the little bottle and rinsed it out into a bucket of warm water to wash my floors with it a few days later because it smelled so darn good.  Floors clean, house smelled like winter-cozy. A friend of mine stopped by and was like "WHAT IS THAT?  IT'S AMAZING!"  Incidentally, I also loved the Cashmere scent.  But Alpine Woods.  My God.  Glad I found you...scent is stunning, laundry (and floors!) are clean, and my wallet is breathing a sigh of relief too...!

title: We smell really good!
body: Lots to love about Mozi!  I have tried so many "clean" laundry soaps in my attemps to get away from chemicals, toxins, etc. I was missing that fresh clean scent that none of them were successful with. Then I found Mozi. I ordered the sampler pack because they had so many scents to choose from. The scents are amazing, I'm spoiled now. I have a scent for my clothes, a scent for my husband's clothes, and a scent for sheets and towels LOL. The scents are perfectly mixed in my opinion, not to overwhelming but enough to smell fantastic and it stays all through drying cycle where the others failed. The scents last in the closet, drawers, and throughout the entire day of wear. My sheets and towels maintain the scent until their next wash. Im hooked. Bonus, they are small growing business in US we can support, just to put the cherry on top.  I highly recommend giving Mozi a try with the sampler pack so you can choose your smells, it was actually fun.

body:
I wasn’t sure what to expect trying Mozi the first time. So, I decided to get the sample pack. I have to admit, I was surprised in a great way! What is great?..

You don’t need much detergent to clean a large load of laundry. I used significantly less detergent to get my laundry very clean!

You don’t need to use stain remover! I washed my husband’s work clothes, with grime and grease, my daughter’s sports apparel, towels, blankets, and daily worn clothes (all separate loads). Without using any stain remover, or fabric softener, the laundry came out clean! Very clean! The brightness of the colors was back to new! The dirt, grime, stains, and smells were completely gone!

Finally, the scents! WOW! I liked them all being honest. The orange wasn’t my favorite, but every single one was great! The scents last! Now when I open my drawer of sheets it smells great; filling the room with fragrance! My towel storage space also smells excellent. I wanted to do this review 3 or more weeks after washing, and everything washes still has a great scent! It hasn’t faded much, maybe even at all.

The only negative is, it’s expensive. However, I’m ok with paying this price because the quality you get is unmatched. The clean, the amount needed, the scant, and overall smell of my fabrics is great! I can’t wait to pick a scent to wash all my curtains in the house! I bet my whole house will smell excellent! 

My favorite scents: Malibu Mornings, Alpine Woods, Hollywood Rouge, Dessert Poppy, Central Coast, Cozy Cashmere, and vanilla moon, in that order. Thanks for making laundry fun again Mozi! Also, you can’t beat the customer service from Mozi!

title: Wonderful smell, subtle but not weak, pleases myself AND my picky roommate!
body: Ive been using the Alpine Woods scent for over a year now and LOVE it. The description of this scent ended up being too tempting to pass up, so I got it in a bundle with my usual. I'm very picky about smells and don't like things too floral, sweet, or strong. This ended up being a GREAT buy because it's fairly subtle, smells CLEAN, but is more compelling and pleasant than just clean laundry scent. The alpine woods is more my speed BUT I really like having this one to use every so often to change things up. My roommate ran out of detergent and asked to borrow some of mine. He usually uses woolite detergent for the specific item he borrowed this for, and doesnt like having any other smell on it. He was unsure at first when it came out of the wash and air dried, since the Golden Hour smell sticks around great when it's not put in the dryer. After a couple days though it faded to be more subtle and he admitted he loves the smell. He says it smells pleasantly clean, minimal, and isn't too sweet/flowery for him. He said he might keep using it for that specific garment despite having been loyal to the woolite before. So consider this a double 5 star review! title: Great smell and goes a long way
body: Ive bought this detergent 3 times now. It's quite effective and the jug lasts a LONG time even though I usually do pretty large loads of laundry. I eyeball the amount of detergent I put in, but I usually aim for somewhere at or a little over a tablespoon. Works great. My clothes never come out smelly or dirty, and in the summer I sweat a LOT and work with animals. It does the job just as well regardless of the season. The great detergent scent is very apparent when taking things out of the wash. If I put them in the dryer a lot of the scent goes away, but it still does stick around in a subtle way on most garments. Although *I* dont notice it much since I smell it all the time, other people comment positively on it. I also use a pine deodorant which helps Im sure. For any items I air dry, the scent sticks around GREAT. Not overpowering but certainly more noticeable. All around great product and although its expensive, it ends up being a really solid value when you take into account how long it lasts.

title: Not what I was expecting....
body:
I purchased the detergent sample pack and then the larger version of Sugar Dew and Vanilla Moon. The Sugar Dew has a very strong scent (not overpowering) that leaves your clothes smelling great! The Vanilla Moon is not very strong at all, and I don’t actually smell anything on my clothes. However, the Desert Poppy is my favorite by far and is what I will be ordering from now on - plus the Sugar Dew for my daughter.
What surprised me was the cleaning power of this. I was not expecting much from the detergent to be honest (sorry Mozi); however, I was pleasantly surprised by how AMAZING this cleans!!! WOW! I have face cloths that I use to remove makeup, and they never come fully clean, stained with makeup, I assumed. One wash with Mozi and 85%+ of the "stains" are gone! I was shocked. So the big brand (Tide) I have been using for years clearly does nothing. I cannot recommend this enough. It is truly awesome.

title: Do I even need perfume anymore?
body: I was skeptical when I purchased Mozi, but I decided to buy a bundle and get the best price possible on what was sure to be a regret purchase. When they got to my door I immediately unboxed them and opened them and I was suddenly afraid I was going to love them and need to change my budget to include bougie laundry detergent now. Hollywood Rouge is hands down my favorite. I love the warm, rich scent. I also love the perfume its modeled after so I knew I would. My favorite daily perfume scent is very similar as well. After my first load of laundry I noticed my clothes were brighter. Not "blah" like they are with other detergents. I noticed less color leeching from my jeans and dark clothes during the wash cycle. The water was not colored in the washer. Then... I noticed how soft they were. I stopped using fabric softener years ago because of the toxicity, the buildup in the machines and the flammability. My clothes were clean, bright,  fabric softener soft and they smelled amazing. I have certainly not regretted this purchase, but I have had to order just about every scent to have on hand for whatever mood I'm in when I wash laundry.

title: When Laundry Detergent Became My Love Language: A Mozi Wash Obsession Story
body:
Let me tell you how I went from laundry-dodging single mom to full-blown fragrance evangelist in less than two weeks.

It started innocently enough. I ordered a sample pack from Mozi Wash through TikTok Shop—nothing wild, just curious. But then TikTok did what TikTok does: canceled my order without warning, no explanation, just gone.

So I did what any desperate woman does when she needs something—I slid into their DMs.

Ashley, who I'd seen on their lives (bubbly, full of life, the kind of human sunshine you want to clone), told me to message them directly. Within 24 hours? A new sample pack was already in the mail. No red tape. No runaround. Just "we got you."

That kind of customer service doesn't just earn loyalty—it builds disciples.

And now? I'm hooked. Obsessed. A full-blown Mozi pusher.

I've ordered so many tins you'd think I'm laundering money instead of clothes. I bought a custom 4-pack (Alpine, Desert Poppy, Sugar Dew, Vanilla Moon), then immediately turned around and ordered Golden Hour and Malibu Mornings before the first box even arrived. I've gifted bottles to my neighbor (who literally stole Alpine from my sample pack), my best friend got Cozy Cashmere, and now my housekeepers are placing orders. One friend sent me a Venmo bill because she's "spent too much already."

You're welcome. I'm not sorry.

Lucy is another gem from their live team—always answering my questions (and I ask a lot). These women make you feel like you're not just buying detergent—you're joining something.

But here's the real magic: it's gentle on sensitive skin (my son and I both have it), but the scent? It lingers. Like expensive perfume. Like intention. Like luxury you can afford.

My son has his scent. I have mine. My sheets have theirs. My towels smell like a boutique hotel. And I sniff my own clothes now like a weirdo because they just smell that good.

So yeah—I'm not just a customer. I'm a believer. And I'm dragging everyone I know into this fragrant little cult with me.

The Scents That Stole My Soul

🌲 Alpine Woods

Pine • Cedarwood • Oakmoss

If confidence had a scent, it would be this.

It's the smell of cold, crisp mountain air—the kind that wakes you up and clears your head in one breath. But as it dries, it softens into something warmer: flannel fresh from the dryer, the weight of a strong embrace, quiet safety wrapped in cedarwood and moss.

My neighbor caught one whiff and begged for a bottle. Now his laundry smells better than half the boutiques in town. I gifted it once—and instantly regretted letting it leave my house.

🌙 Vanilla Moon

Vanilla • White Flower • Coffee

This is the scent of exhale.

Warm, creamy vanilla swirled with something floral and musky—like candlelight, soft sheets, and the moment you finally let your shoulders drop. It's the smell of being held, even when you're alone.

I use it for everything that touches skin: blankets, pillowcases, the towels you wrap yourself in after a long day. My linens hold onto it for days, like a whisper that refuses to fade.

If comfort had a fragrance, this would be it.

🍓 Sugar Dew

Tropical Fruits • Citrus • Hibiscus

Sweet, bright, and innocent—but never childish.

It smells like sunshine on warm skin, bare feet on clean floors, soft laughter drifting down the hallway. I use it for my son's clothes, and every time I fold his laundry, it smells like joy. Like love in motion.

Folding laundry shouldn't feel sacred, but with Sugar Dew? It kind of does.

🌺 Desert Poppy

Poppy • Ambrette • Tonka Bean

Wild. Radiant. Unforgettable.

Desert Poppy doesn't ask for attention—it commands it. It's floral with a sultry edge, like sunlight meeting bare skin, like walking into a room and knowing every head will turn.

Every time I wear clothes washed in this, strangers ask what perfume I'm wearing.

It's not perfume. It's laundry day, reimagined.

This one's mine.

🌊 Central Coast

Sandalwood • Citrus • Sea Salt

A coastal morning, bottled.

It's the smell of salt air and sunlight through linen curtains—fresh, grounding, free. The citrus cuts through the warmth of sandalwood, and suddenly your home smells like minimalist luxury. Like a secret weekend in Malibu you never want to leave.

It's both calming and elevated. The kind of scent that makes your space feel expensive.

Why This Matters

I'm a single mom. An author. A woman running on fumes half the time, stretched thin, juggling a kid and deadlines and a house that never stays clean for more than six minutes.

But Mozi Wash? It makes the mundane feel luxurious. It turns laundry—the most soul-sucking chore—into something I actually look forward to.

And the fact that it's safe for sensitive skin, hypoallergenic, and still manages to make my clothes smell like a five-star hotel? That's not just good product design—that's life-changing.

So yes, I'm obsessed. Yes, I've turned into that person who talks about laundry detergent like it's a spiritual experience.

And yes, I'm going to keep ordering more. Because if there's one thing I've learned, it's this:

Small luxuries matter. Especially when they smell this damn good.

Mozi Wash—if you're reading this? Let's talk. Because I'm not just a customer anymore. I'm your biggest fan, your loudest hype woman, and now your unofficial brand ambassador. 

Now send me more samples before I buy out your entire stock.

🖤 — Teri

P.S. Still waiting (im)patiently for Golden Hour and Malibu Mornings to arrive. Will report back. But if they're half as good as the rest? You're going to need to hire more people to keep up with demand.

title: Everyone Asks What It Is!
body:
I’m OBSESSED with the Mozi Wash Central Coast laundry detergent!!!! The scent is unbelievably fresh and clean — like ocean air mixed with sunshine. When the laundry’s going, my whole house smells amazing. Friends always ask what air freshener I’m using, and they can’t believe it’s just my detergent.

What I love most is how the scent lingers subtly on clothes — not overpowering, just that perfect, crisp “fresh from the coast” vibe. When I’m wearing something fresh out of the wash and my body warms up, it gives off this soft, cologne-like scent that people notice and love.

It’s become my absolute favorite — clean, coastal, and seriously addictive.

title: Sample kits rock
body:
I recently tried the Mozi Wash Sample Kit, and I’m so impressed! It’s such a thoughtful idea — you get to experience all of their signature scents in one set, and it completely changes the way you think about laundry. Each wash feels like a new little luxury moment, and it’s so fun discovering which scent fits your mood or lifestyle best.
From fresh and clean to cozy and warm, every single fragrance has its own personality — and the best part is how incredibly long-lasting they are. My clothes have never smelled this good! You can tell Mozi uses high-quality, clean ingredients because my fabrics feel softer and fresher without any heavy residue or chemical scent.
As a mom who does laundry nonstop, I love that this sample kit lets you test everything before committing to a full-size bottle. It’s a small investment that helps you find your perfect match — and honestly, it makes doing laundry feel like self-care.
If you’ve been curious about Mozi Wash, the sample kit is the best place to start. You’ll fall in love with at least one scent (if not all of them!) — and your clothes will never smell better.

title: LOVE MOZI WASH!!! BUY IT NOW!
body:
I don’t usually rave about laundry detergent, but Mozi Wash deserves every bit of praise! From the very first load, I could tell this wasn’t your average detergent — it’s next-level clean. The scent is absolutely incredible  fresh, elevated, and long-lasting without being overpowering. My entire laundry room smells amazing, and every time I open my closet or pull something out of the dryer, I get that same crisp, clean aroma that feels like a spa day for your clothes.
Beyond the diffrent scents, I’ve noticed how soft and refreshed everything feels. Towels, bedding, even athletic wear Mozi Wash gets out stubborn odors and leaves fabrics feeling brand-new. You can tell it’s made with care and quality ingredients that actually work.
As a busy mom who’s constantly juggling kids, events, and endless laundry, finding a product that makes this daily task feel special is such a win. Mozi Wash turns a simple chore into a little act of self-care. 
If you haven’t tried it yet, trust me — you’ll never go back. Your clothes will never smell (or feel) better! And if you ever want to sponsor a tired Mama over here Mozi Wash, I am your girl!

title: Alpine Woods (Green) x2
body:
First impressions (Male): 

Handheld, small container was pleasant wasn't expecting that.

Very slow to pour not a fan but makes you pour less for sure.

Strong scent on clothes coming out of the dryer still.

Cleaned on my brighter clothes better than my store brand with oxi clean.



Lasting impressions: 

Not tough on oil, grease, or overall car maintenance stains.

Cleans well on most other, normal filth. 

Little amount of detergent needed for cleaning like other very concentrated detergents.

Smells good for a day, adds to my cologne scent well, then fades to 'clean' smell. 

Highly recommended if you can spare the cash, have not ran the numbers yet on price per load.



Thanks to Ian Caroll on Candace for the spreadsheet to find this company.

title: Takes away smell of urine completely.
body:
I love the scent of Sugar Dew, my mom loved your scent Ocean. I gave her the can of Ocean, as she was washing a loved ones urine soaked laundry. She has "city" water and only used a tablespoon of the soap. It completely removed all of the urine smell. She used 3 different big brands, which all failed to remove the strong scent of urine. 

The reason I order so often is that we have hard water and a water softener, but I have to use so much more of your product for clean clothes. There's not a whole lot of scent after their dried and folded. 

I like the fact that I'm not using carcinogenic products anymore. Though the process are a tad high for us. 

Thank you for coming up with this product.

title: Outstanding Product - Please don’t change it
body: If all the company says about its healthy, economical production is true, then that, along with my great experience with the detergent, make it worth the cost, and the wait for my orders to arrive. I use an average of two tablespoons a load, 3-4 for clothes or linens that might be dirtier than usual, and my clothes leave the dryer seemingly softer and cleaner than ever. If I use one of the scented detergents, everything smells amazing. I do use the unscented detergent often due to family and pet allergies, and am as happy as can be even without the lovely scents. Pro-tip: I use a cap from a liquid cold medicine to measure out my tbs, which is easier, with less spills than using an actual tablespoon. If Mozi remains unbought by any of the places I choose to boycott, it will likely be my laundry detergent of choice for a long time.

title: Great stuff!
body: My skin is incredibly sensitive and I used to only use detergents that were non scented. This is the first scented detergent I could use that didn’t irritate my skin! I use it in every load now and get regular compliments on the scent. I have dogs and cats so it’s great to have something to freshen up my bedding and such as well. Easy to store, compact, and minimal packaging. I do recommend keeping the container lid closed as I noticed it seemed to get darker in color if I left it open so I seal the lid now with no problems just in case.Product is Exactly as advertised. Definitely worth the price when you consider how condensed it is and how much less you need per load. All in all, my new favorite detergent.

product_name: Mozi Wash 6 Scent Sample Pack X2
title: Great sample pack
body:
Highly recommend this sample pack. Everyone likes different smells and the explanations may not be enough but I’ll do my best to explain some. I was surprised by one of them since I saw someone else's review of it and thought I wouldn't like it based on their description but I was wrong. Which is why I think this sample pack is great! Only downside would be if you end up not liking a lot of them and not wanting to do any laundry with it. But I'd rather waste a small pack than a whole tin. I think the smells linger nicely on the clothes but obviously how much will depend on the amount you use each load. I don't think you need much to keep them smelling good for a bit but if you like the stronger smell then use more. 



Ranked in order of how I liked them. Some don't have great descriptions....sorry!



Desert poppy- I really liked this scent. It’s floral but still light. I think I may switch to it. If we are gendering smells then I would say it's more feminine/girly than some of the others.



Central coast is what I had normally been using and I like that one a lot. It’s a fresh scent. Seems very neutral to me gender wise. I may go back to it depending on how desert poppy works for me long term. 



Vanilla moon- this one was also good but I didn't have a ready description for it. 



Cozy Cashmere- no idea how to describe but I did like it. I don’t want it for my laundry but the smell overall was nice. This was the one I thought I wouldn't like due to a review. I would love it in like a candle or something.



Alpine Woods smelled like man (complementary) but I don't want my laundry smelling like that either. It was like that black ice little tree car air freshener. 



Sugar dew smelled like medicine to me. Couldn’t pinpoint which it was but it was like one from childhood that's super syrupy. Not good to me. I didn't even end up washing anything with this one.

title: Sniff sniff bliss
body: I got Mozi wash because I wanted to break away from corporate goods and support smaller businesses but also to find products that help eliminate/minimize plastic waste. First of all, the scents are as good as the flaunt. I got the Cashmere one and it hits that comfort note. Imagine burying your face in a freshly washed and dried towel. We need more of this now more than ever bc world’s gone mad. Second, design fits my aesthetic, and that feels GREAT. No more giant neon orange blob sitting around. Third, because of the concentration, a tablespoon of soap goes a long way. Lastly, excellent customer service. Yes it exists and yes a human responds. Chefs kiss on laundry soap was not on my bingo card.

title: Never going back to any other detergent
body: If you haven’t tried Mozi, this is your sign to do it! I have been using Mozi Wash for quite some time now. I keep at least 4 cans on deck in my laundry room at all times. My top 4 go to scents are Desert Poppy, Sugar Dew, Vanilla Moon, and Cozy Cashmere. Of course I also keep a can of Central Coast on hand for my husband. He’ll tell you that’s the best scent and always gets compliments on how he smells. Typically I order Mozi off of TikTok shop but I will be starting to order directly from their website. I can’t recommend this brand enough. Nothing makes me feel better or more confident than when I pull out a fresh outfit straight from the dryer nice and warm and smelling AMAZING. The scent also lasts a while on your clothes after you hang em up or golden and put them away. So if your in the fence of whether to try it or not….. just do it, you won’t regret it!

title: Love the detergent, hate the container: it leaks
body:
I love the detergent; in fact, I've bought 3 cans of it! The first one started slowly leaking down the weld seam not too long after delivery. Thinking it was probably just a fluke, I bought two more during a sale. 

It wasn't a fluke. The other two started to leak as well. Unfortunately, I didn't catch one of them quick enough, and the seam rusted from the leak and contaminated the detergent, making it unusable. 

Perhaps the packaging just needs a revamp altogether. The detergent is great; it cleans well and smells amazing, but you should have to immediately transfer it to another container upon receipt because the packaging is so unreliable.

It lasts all day, it leaves my clothes feeling clean and soft coming out of the wash, and it smells amazing. I have both the central coast and the alpine woods, and both are awesome. Even on days when I don't wear cologne, I feel like I still smell great. I couldn't recommend this product enough!

title: Amazing scent and customer service, but clothes don't get clean
body:
I love the scent and bottle and vibe of Mozi wash so much, I wish that it worked for me! My bottle was defective and wouldn't open properly so their amazing customer service set me up with another one (in a new scent) which was perfect. That bottle actually ended up leaking from the bottom and they offered me another free bottle again (though I didn't take it). The customer service and the guy who runs it is great! 



That being said, my clothes didn't get clean. Like at all. The detergent works great for my sheets and leaves a great scent that lasts for weeks, but on actually dirty clothes the soap clings to any stains and leaves them embedded in the fabric. I'm not talking about crazy gross stains but any sort of organic stain (particularly those in underwear) seems to require an enzyme to break it down and properly clean. Mozi wash does not have an enzyme in their detergent and so I have had to switch back to Tide or Cleancult for my clothing. 



If you ever do add an enzyme to your wash, I will be a loyal customer!
standout_phrases: ["I love the scent and bottle and vibe of Mozi wash", "their amazing customer service set me up with another one"]

title: A Little Goes A Long Way
body: I didn't have any expectations when ordering this product. I went off of reviews and the commercials I watched on social media. I have to say that I am pleasantly surprised. I like the metal container (wondering if there will be a way to send the containers back to Mozi rather sending it to my local recycling center, maybe as cost saving measure) and the smell, as one review put it, like washing your items in cologne, which I really like. Not like an overwhelming chemical bath of odors, like what you get with most off the shelf brands. This has a subtle, clean scent. I really do like the way my clothes smell now. It took a bit to get a system down for measuring the necessary amount to use. Though that little amount goes a long way, which I appreciate. Overall, after using Mozi wash for the last few weeks, I like it, and I will order more in the future.

title: I’m a believer
body: I’m glad I decided to try this detergent. I’ve been transitioning almost every regular use product I have to a plastic free version wherever possible making many sacrifices, and I’m happy to say this is NOT a sacrifice! My clothes feel and smell so clean! I’m also a fairly large guy who can definitely sweat, and I work in shops that create plenty of debris and dust (wood shops, manufacturing, and clay, I’m an artist *shrug*), so I can definitely put this stuff to the test. I think it could only be better if as a relatively local Southern Californian, I could deliver or even drop off empty canisters for new ones for a more direct recycling process. Food for thought? My partner, who also likes them got Sugar Dew and Central Coast, and will be trying out Cozy Cashmere and Alpine Woods next.

title: CHANGE THE WAY YOU WASH!
body:
I always go into purchasing things off of Instagram with trepidation. Seems I always have high hopes and then those hopes get dashed when I receive my purchase-creating a never-ending cycle of purchasing and returning. This was not one of those times.

Mozi Wash is the real deal! 

The first thing I washed was a blanket that I keep on my sofa. My entire apartment smelled amazing during the washing and drying cycles and then when I came home from work the next day, my dog smelled amazing because she slept on the blanket! The Cozy Cashmere has such a warm inviting, intoxicating scent! My apartment now smells like a lobby of a high end hotel! 

Looking forward to trying other scents! 

I’ll also add that it takes so little because it’s so concentrated! And one last confession: before I went out for the evening one night I ran my finger around the rim of the can and rubbed it in my hands and on my neck and my wrists, so I could carry that scent with me!

call me crazy!

title: BEST DETERGENT EVER!!
body:
I use to get those tide pods and the uniform pod was too much laundry detergent. they’d leave a weird feeling on my clothes yet still! the laundry scent never came through. Plus, the amount of plastic waste produced was so much! i decided to try something new.

i got two scents: alpine woods and cozy cashmere. The first time i did laundry, i use about a tablespoon and a half and the smell was too strong! they are NOT joking around with it being super concentrated. i started using only about a teaspoon for my medium/small loads but the smell is still so strong and heavenly! i actually enjoy folding laundry now.

it’s so concentrated, so even if it feels like you’re spending more for less, i have a sneaky suspicion this is going to last me as long, if not much longer, than the 35 loads i would get from a big tide pod jumbo pack. not only that, but they’re shipped in cardboard, protected with cardboard to prevent damage in shipping, and they’re metal canisters and thus recyclable! Not to mention their plant based formula? Not only that, buying 2+ in a purchase helps you save?! i feel like it’s almost a steal! Honestly, i could probably go on about this product.

Great price for a great product that really lives up to what it’s trying to achieve. I can say for certain that i am never switching back to traditional laundry detergent ever again. Thank you Mozi Wash!

title: Great fragrance!
body:
First order was central coast. Gets the clothes clean with a fraction of traditional laundry soap. 

My first load was sheets and i doubted the 2 tablespoon suggestion so used 4 and still had suds. Had to run an extra rinse cycle. Since then i only use 2Tbs. 

Had a blanket i could NOT get the dog smell out of no matter how many times i washed it. Vinegar. Soap. Oxi. Etc. Used this and the smell is gone!!! 

I am sold. Will be a repeat customer.

Costly if you do a lot of laundry (big families) so only 4 starts vs 5.

title: Expensive but worth it
body: I love everything about Mozi Wash except the price, however to me it's worth it. The smell is so enticing, I love hugging people when I'm wearing clothes washed with Mozi because they always ask what scent I'm wearing! This is how I justify the price- people spend a ton on perfume and cologne, so instead I spend my money on this! The smell is noticeable but not overwhelming, and it doesn't fade. In the desperate attempt to make each tin last longer and save money, I've started to buy cheap unscented detergent and do half a capful of that with half a capful of Mozi, and even then the scent is strong enough that I notice it throughout the day. I've only tried the Alpine Woods scent so far which I find perfect for fall/winter, but I plan to try them all (one with each paycheck lol). One thing that I wish came with each shipment would be some sort of measuring cup. I ended up using the cap from my other detergent, but for the price I feel like this would be an appropriate addition. I ended up using way too much the first time when I tried to eyeball it.

title: Exactly what I have been searching for
body: I ordered from TikTok shop and was a little hesitant. I’ve tried so many detergents in the past that fell short of my expectations. Mozi exceeded them all. It’s liquid. Not thick or gummy. The fragrance is bold but not overwhelmingly chemically strong. The true test was in the wash. My first load was towels. I’m talking the dirty ones. The ones used to remove mascara…the ones used to clean up the spilled grape juice. One wash. Two ounces of detergent and all came out clean. Upon opening the washer, the fragrance hit again. No hint of dingy water…no mildewy smell. Just a nice, clean forest fresh. Onto the dryer—we don’t use fabric softeners so I didn’t expect the abundant fluff I discovered when the cycle completed. My towels have never been this fluffy. They’ve never felt so clean! If Mozi wash can accomplish this amazement in one wash, I’m seriously questioning what’s in the other detergents that leaves the fabric limp, dingy and coated in…I don’t even know what! I’m sold. I’m going to need Mozi to restock soon because I will be re-washing everything in our home and discarding all other detergents.
